name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of insurance premium payments is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of insurance premium payments is time-consuming and error-prone.
